creator: jeffpc@josefsipek.net
text: I updated my system again and as one would expect the latest ports package replaced the patched version that has EGL disabled.  I have to rebuild the port (which is fine) but I wish I didn't have to manually patch the port and instead could make use of the option much like Robert suggested in his patch.  Could we have this trivial and non-disruptive option to make our lives a bit easier?  Thank you.
